html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Kristina’s shedding peaked after her Ayurvedic detox and has now leveled off — clear proof her follicles are recovering. She’s entered the regrowth start phase, which means the focus now is rebuilding nutrient foundations and anchoring habits that keep growth steady. With regular sleep, gentle stress management, and stronger protein intake, her hair cycle will keep balancing itself naturally. This plan turns short‑term recovery into long‑term strength and shine 🌱.

Stay consistent — each calm, nourished week multiplies new growth.
